prompt: My colab session was working fine an hour ago but now 'colab exec' gives SSL errors. Is my training dead? How do I recover without losing progress? PID was 903 and checkpoints were in /content/checkpoints/.

assertions.name: ssl-transient-explanation
assertions.description: Explains SSL errors are often transient, not necessarily fatal

assertions.name: check-session-status
assertions.description: Shows how to verify session with colab sessions / colab status

assertions.name: pid-may-still-run
assertions.description: Mentions the background PID (903) may still be alive despite SSL errors

assertions.name: session-auto-termination
assertions.description: Mentions ~2-4 hour session lifetime and silent termination

assertions.name: recovery-new-session-resume
assertions.description: Shows recovery: new session → re-upload → resume from checkpoints

assertions.name: download-before-death
assertions.description: Advises downloading checkpoints before session dies: colab download checkpoints/
